LuxScaleAI - Uniformity (point-by-point IES grid)
Timestamp: 2026-03-31T00:42:20.353243
Room length (m): 55, width (m): 66, ceiling height (m): 7.0
Required lux: 1500.0, Standard Uo: 0.7
Work plane z = 0.75 m, grid 5x5, wall margin 3 m (same as fixture inset)

========================================================================
Option 1 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 100 w\BVP130 T25 1 xLED131-4S_830 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 13000.00 lm; IES file header: 13000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 616, phi_each_lm=14052.76, phi_total_lm=8656500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 3015.436187
  E_avg (lx): 3367.590834
  E_max (lx): 3676.616224
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.895428
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.820166

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   3015.4362   3313.5347   3134.7667   3217.0694   3281.5265

   3293.9986   3247.8289   3411.2112   3152.2701   3215.2866

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 2 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 100 w\BVP130 T25 1 xLED131-4S_830 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 13000.00 lm; IES file header: 13000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 546, phi_each_lm=15853.48, phi_total_lm=8656000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 3016.035122
  E_avg (lx): 3341.348067
  E_max (lx): 3683.216795
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.902640
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.818859

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   3060.2355   3114.4937   3085.1571   3385.2256   3168.6312

   3016.0351   3065.2825   3399.6060   3325.9768   3144.1903

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 3 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 100
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Street 100 w\BVP130 T25 1 xLED131-4S_830 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 13000.00 lm; IES file header: 13000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 437, phi_each_lm=19816.93, phi_total_lm=8660000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 2908.933619
  E_avg (lx): 3312.253774
  E_max (lx): 3695.711338
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.878234
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.787111

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   3284.0867   3035.6292   3298.4883   3435.1213   2998.6755

   3144.7002   2945.5720   3167.7455   2908.9336   2943.3071

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 4 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 138
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-ies\SC HIGHBAY\00cb888b824ff34f298d4c3c95d5a401.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: design lumens (IES header missing or ≤0)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 20010.00 lm; IES file header: -0.99 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 437, phi_each_lm=19781.05, phi_total_lm=8644320.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 1085.479890
  E_avg (lx): 1320.949520
  E_max (lx): 1525.688288
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.821742
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.711469

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   1180.8095   1315.2558   1298.8354   1085.4799   1467.2969

   1145.1708   1449.2132   1280.1603   1395.5722   1428.9101

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 5 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 138
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-ies\SC HIGHBAY\00cb888b824ff34f298d4c3c95d5a401.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: design lumens (IES header missing or ≤0)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 22080.00 lm; IES file header: -0.99 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 396, phi_each_lm=21856.97, phi_total_lm=8655360.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 973.383600
  E_avg (lx): 1195.429632
  E_max (lx): 1367.139796
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.814254
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.711985

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   1054.0158   1367.1398    973.3836   1169.1351   1177.2345
   1253.7496   1091.0291   1236.3076   1354.1872   1184.2846
   1018.6540   1296.3413   1254.4733   1130.7212   1326.8763
   1180.9127   1217.4234   1138.0610   1305.1819   1057.6246
   1282.0707   1199.2503   1257.9951   1053.1049   1306.5833

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 6 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 138
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-ies\SC HIGHBAY\00cb888b824ff34f298d4c3c95d5a401.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: design lumens (IES header missing or ≤0)
  (φ for I/I_rated: 27600.00 lm; IES file header: -0.99 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 320, phi_each_lm=27082.50, phi_total_lm=8666400.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 752.411685
  E_avg (lx): 893.294108
  E_max (lx): 1069.428465
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.842289
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.703564

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
    849.1613    849.9769    849.9328    849.4575    834.3090
    808.6981    812.2099    812.4348    811.8586    795.2994
    764.4921    768.8646    769.3720    768.8099    752.4117
   1064.2637   1068.7502   1069.4285   1068.9708   1051.7861
    981.5355    986.1116    986.8973    986.6543    970.6659

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 7 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 150 w\by698p+led265cw+wb+g2.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 26500.00 lm; IES file header: 26500.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 414, phi_each_lm=20909.42, phi_total_lm=8656500.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 2403.855327
  E_avg (lx): 2678.985236
  E_max (lx): 2900.962299
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.897301
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.828641

  (x → length, y ↑ width; origin bottom-left of usable area)
  +----------------------------------------------------+
  |....................................................|
  |.*..*..*.*..*..*..*..*..*.*..*..*..*..*..*.*..*..*..|

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   2403.8553   2569.1581   2589.0995   2569.1581   2403.8553
   2664.3804   2869.8663   2889.9559   2869.8663   2664.3804
   2667.6181   2875.6407   2900.9623   2875.6407   2667.6181
   2664.3804   2869.8663   2889.9559   2869.8663   2664.3804
   2403.8553   2569.1581   2589.0995   2569.1581   2403.8553

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 8 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 150 w\by698p+led265cw+wb+g2.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 26500.00 lm; IES file header: 26500.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 378, phi_each_lm=22920.63, phi_total_lm=8664000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 2397.965171
  E_avg (lx): 2681.645218
  E_max (lx): 2905.852998
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.894214
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.825219

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 9 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 150
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 150 w\by698p+led265cw+wb+g2.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 26500.00 lm; IES file header: 26500.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 304, phi_each_lm=28519.74, phi_total_lm=8670000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 2413.229502
  E_avg (lx): 2685.590728

Sample grid illuminance E (lx), row-major (first row = y min):
   2413.2295   2593.7496   2609.3300   2593.7496   2413.2295

========================================================================

========================================================================
Option 10 — Uniformity (point-by-point, IES candela)
========================================================================
Luminaire: SC highbay
Power (W): 200
Standard Uo (required): 0.7
IES file: C:\xampp\htdocs\LuxScaleAI\ies-render\SC-Database\Highbay 400 w\BVP651 T45 1 xLED600-4S_757 S.ies

Method:
  - Horizontal work plane at z = work_plane_height (m).
  - Ceiling / luminaire height = room height (m).
  - Grid: N x N points with wall margin (m).
  - For each grid point: E = sum( I(theta,phi) * cos(i) / R^2 ),
    I scaled by per-fixture lumens vs IES-rated lumens.
  - U0 = E_min / E_avg,  U1 = E_min / E_max.

Candela scaling: IES header lumens
  (φ for I/I_rated: 60000.00 lm; IES file header: 60000.00 lm)

Parameters: grid_n=5, wall_margin_m=3.0, work_plane_z_m=0.75, ceiling_z_m=7.0
Layout fixtures (grid): 304, phi_each_lm=28523.03, phi_total_lm=8671000.00

Results:
  E_min (lx): 2474.166006
  E_avg (lx): 2866.172929
  E_max (lx): 3102.839363
  U0 calculated (E_min/E_avg): 0.863230
  U1 (E_min/E_max): 0.797388
